title: Alignments of white lupin pangenome scaffolds carrying LalbFTa1, LalbFTa1, LalbFTc1 and LalbFTc2 genes
author: Bielski, Wojciech Krzysztof
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
File “LalbFTa1_final_alignment_GWAS2.fasta” contains LalbFTa1 gene alignment in FASTA format carrying the following contigs: 
 LD37_contig_002595 
 P27174-4_contig_014309 
 P27174-4_contig_000651 
 LalbFTa1_Chr02 
   
 File “LalbFTa2_final_alignment_GWAS2.fasta” contains LalbFTa2 gene alignment in FASTA format carrying the following contigs: 
 Clovis_contig_006417 
 GR38_contig_001073 
 LalbFTa2_Chr21 
   
 File “LalbFTc1_final_alignment_GWAS2.fasta” contains LalbFTc1 gene alignment in FASTA format carrying the following contigs: 
 LD37_contig_001630 
 P27174-4_contig_001786 
 LalbFTc1_Chr14 
 GR38_contig_001107 
 and the following LalbFTc1 gene PCR products: 
 PR36_LAP022b_PRFTc1F3 
 PR36_LAP022e_PRFTC1F3 
 PR42_LAP029b_PRFTC1F5 
 PR42_LAP030a_PRFTC1F5 
   
 File “LalbFTc2_final_alignment_GWAS2.fasta” contains LalbFTc2 gene alignment in FASTA format carrying the following contigs: 
 Dieta_contig_008195 
 P27174-4_contig_011400 
 P27174-4_contig_003576 
 GR38_contig_008213 
 Dieta_contig_007291 
 LalbFTc2_Chr09 
   
 File “Major LalbFTa1, LalbFTa2, LalbFTc1 and LalbFTc2 gene indels.pdf” contains the list of all major indels (size  ≥ 3bp) present in the LalbFTa1, LalbFTa2, LalbFTc1 and LalbFTc2 gene alignments.
